summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WaveWatch iteration 10 - WebSocket notifications, recommendations, enhanced playlists, menu restructure, TV channels modal, and database-driven content pages. Backend 100% functional, frontend 85% functional with minor modal issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Detail modal not opening when clicking music items
Detail modal not opening when clicking software items

integration_issues.issue: Only 1 channel (Canal+) visible instead of expected 8 channels from backend
Session timeout causing redirect to login page

passed_tests: Homepage recommendations section visible for logged-in users
Homepage playlists show 2x2 thumbnail grid (6 images found)
Notification bell visible and clickable with data-testid=notification-bell
Content menu contains Musique and Jeux
Media menu does NOT contain Musique
Music page loads 1 item from database API /api/music
Games page loads 1 item from database API /api/games with working modal
Ebooks page loads 2 items from database API with working modal
Software page loads 2 items from database API /api/software
Dashboard accessible with stats and recommendations sections
All 21 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
WebSocket notifications functional despite console errors
User favorites, history, and stats endpoints working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal click handlers for Music and Software pages. Investigate TV channels display issue (backend returns 8 channels but frontend shows only 1). Consider session timeout configuration for admin access.
